codeReview.summary: The ORG-1 parsing utility is correctly implemented as a standalone informational utility. It provides parseORG1Data, mapORG1ToBlok, and compareORG1WithBlok functions that correctly parse Cost Centre codes from the ORG-1 sheet and map them to Blok codes. The implementation is consistent with the feature description stating ORG-1 is 'informational only' since Blok data primarily comes from aresta.xlsx.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker discovered and documented the ORG-1 sheet structure (4-row header with 'TULAS SAKTIJAYA', 'KODE COST CENTRE KEBUN', empty row, then headers). This structure knowledge is now embedded in the parseORG1Data function comments but could be useful for other workers performing Excel imports.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/main/blokDatabase.ts lines 727-740 - parseORG1Data function documents the sheet structure

summary: Review passed. The ORG-1 parsing utility correctly implements the feature requirements. It parses 127 rows from ORG-1 sheet, finds 120 Blok mappings, and provides comparison functionality against existing Blok records. TypeScript compilation and linting pass. The implementation is informational as specified in the feature description.
